title: [PrepareForEmission] Constant array async reset values create a wire

features.name: array-typed async reset value for register
features.description: Code should include a register declaration with async reset and an unpacked array-typed reset value where array elements are individually assigned constant values
features.snippet: reg [1:0] r; always @(posedge clock or posedge reset) if (reset) r <= 2'b0;

features.name: constant aggregate reset value lowered to wire
features.description: Code should include a scenario where a constant aggregate value (array) used as reset value gets incorrectly lowered to a wire declaration during emission instead of being inlined as a literal constant
